title: Positive flow: View tasks in 'MY TASK LIST' tab
test_steps: Open the application. | Tap on the 'MY TASK LIST' tab. | Verify that the task 'Get groceries' is displayed.
expected_result: The task 'Get groceries' is visible under the 'MY TASK LIST' tab.

title: Negative flow: No tasks in 'COMPLETED TASKS' tab
test_steps: Open the application. | Tap on the 'MY TASK LIST' tab. | Tap on the 'COMPLETED TASKS' tab. | Verify that the 'COMPLETED TASKS' tab is empty.

title: Positive flow: Add a new task
test_steps: Open the application. | Tap on the 'MY TASK LIST' tab. | Tap on the yellow circular button with a plus sign at the bottom right. | Enter a new task name, e.g., 'Buy milk'. | Tap on the 'Add' button to save the new task.
expected_result: The new task 'Buy milk' is added to the 'MY TASK LIST' tab.

title: Negative flow: Empty task input
test_steps: Open the application. | Tap on the 'MY TASK LIST' tab. | Tap on the yellow circular button with a plus sign at the bottom right. | Enter an empty task name. | Tap on the 'Add' button.
expected_result: No new task is added to the 'MY TASK LIST' tab.

title: Positive flow: Navigate between tabs
test_steps: Open the application. | Tap on the 'MY TASK LIST' tab. | Tap on the 'ASSIGNED BY ME' tab. | Tap on the 'MY TASK LIST' tab again.
expected_result: The application navigates between the 'MY TASK LIST' and 'ASSIGNED BY ME' tabs.

title: Negative flow: Tap on empty 'COMPLETED TASKS' tab
test_steps: Open the application. | Tap on the 'MY TASK LIST' tab. | Tap on the 'COMPLETED TASKS' tab.

title: Positive flow: Toggle between tabs
test_steps: Open the application. | Tap on the 'MY TASK LIST' tab. | Tap on the 'ASSIGNED BY ME' tab. | Tap on the 'MY TASK LIST' tab again.
expected_result: The application toggles between the 'MY TASK LIST' and 'ASSIGNED BY ME' tabs.

title: Negative flow: Tap on empty 'ASSIGNED BY ME' tab
test_steps: Open the application. | Tap on the 'MY TASK LIST' tab. | Tap on the 'ASSIGNED BY ME' tab.
expected_result: The 'ASSIGNED BY ME' tab remains empty.
